name: stats_get
description: Retrieve application usage statistics including message counts, connections, channels, and API requests.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start of time range (millisecond epoch or ISO 8601).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of stat records to return (default 100).

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Time unit granularity (minute, hour, day, month).
